title: sphaeranthus zavattarii
intro: Sphaeranthus zavattarii, also known as Zavattari's buttonweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sphaeranthus zavattarii include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as protecting against oxidative stress and microbial infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
